_description: Crypto-specific configuration - Optimized from V9 results

_IMPORTANT_PRICE_TARGET_LOGIC.description: V10 uses DYNAMIC TP/SL based on regression model predictions
workflow: 5. Fallback: If regression unavailable, use fallback_tp_pct/sl_pct from V9
_IMPORTANT_PRICE_TARGET_LOGIC.rationale: Fixed TP/SL ignores market context. Big moves deserve wider TP. Small moves need tighter TP/SL. This is the KEY innovation of V10.

BTC.name: Bitcoin
BTC._comment_confidence: V10 improved: 35% (lowered from 40% to increase trade frequency)
BTC._comment_fixed: V10 improved: Fixed TP/SL minimums to prevent too-tight stops
BTC._comment_fallback: Only if regression model unavailable (V9 baseline: +8.82% ROI)
BTC._comment_position: Conservative sizing for BTC, can increase on high confidence
BTC._comment_magnitude: Only trade if regression predicts >3% move

ETH.name: Ethereum
ETH._comment_confidence: V10 improved: 35% (lowered from 50% to increase trade frequency)
ETH._comment_fixed: V10 improved: Fixed TP/SL minimums to prevent too-tight stops
ETH._comment_fallback: Only if regression model unavailable (V9 baseline: +70.51% ROI)
ETH._comment_position: Can be more aggressive, ETH responds well to BTC influence
ETH._comment_magnitude: Only trade if regression predicts >3% move
ETH._comment_btc: BTC influence features CRITICAL for ETH (0% → 70.51% ROI)

SOL.name: Solana
SOL.description: High volatility altcoin, strong BTC correlation
SOL._comment_confidence: V10 improved: 35% (lowered from 55% to increase trade frequency)
SOL._comment_fixed: V10 improved: Fixed TP/SL minimums to prevent too-tight stops
SOL._comment_fallback: Only if regression model unavailable (V9 baseline: -18.52% ROI)
SOL._comment_position: Smaller sizing due to higher volatility and poor V9 performance
SOL._comment_btc: SOL heavily influenced by BTC, increase weight
SOL._comment_volatility: Enable ATR-based TP/SL adjustment for SOL

_global_settings._comment_risk: Risk max 2% of portfolio per trade (Kelly criterion)
